_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The cumulative probability distribution of the cross sectional area of manually traced Nf1+/+ (n = 2344) and Nf1+/- (n = 2586) VTA dopaminergic neuron somata (two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test; D = 0.18, p<0.001)
details: VTA dopaminergic soma cross-sectional area was reduced in Nf1+/- mice (n=2586 somata) compared to Nf1+/+ (n=2344 somata) (two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test; D=0.18, p<0.001)
